phrases.intent_en: Ask where to catch the tram into the city centre
phrases.text_local: Où puis-je prendre le tramway pour rejoindre le centre-ville ?
phrases.pronunciation: oo PWEE-zheh PRAN-dreh leh tram-WAY poor reh-ZHWAN-dreh leh SAN-treh-VEEL
phrases.cultural_note: Tram Line 2 connects both airport terminals to the city centre in about 30 minutes — much cheaper than a taxi.

responses.english: The tram stop is at the terminal exit.
responses.phonetic: lah-RAY doo TRAM eh tah lah sor-TEE doo tair-mee-NAHL
responses.local: L'arrêt du tram est à la sortie du terminal.

phrases.intent_en: Ask which terminal handles international flights
phrases.text_local: Quel terminal est dédié aux vols internationaux ?
phrases.pronunciation: kel tehr-mee-NAL eh day-dee-AY oh VOL an-tehr-na-syo-NOH
phrases.cultural_note: Nice airport has two terminals: Terminal 1 for international flights and Terminal 2 for domestic and some European routes.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to find a taxi to Cannes
phrases.text_local: Où puis-je trouver un taxi pour me rendre à Cannes ?
phrases.pronunciation: oo PWEE-zheh troo-VAY un tak-SEE poor meh RAN-dreh ah KAN
phrases.cultural_note: Taxis to Cannes cost around €80–100 and take 30–40 minutes depending on traffic. Agree on a price before departing.

responses.english: The taxi queue is in front of the terminal.
responses.phonetic: lah FEEL duh tak-SEE eh duh-VAHN luh tair-mee-NAHL
responses.local: La file de taxis est devant le terminal.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if there is a currency exchange desk
phrases.text_local: Y a-t-il un bureau de change dans l'aéroport ?
phrases.pronunciation: ee ah-TEEL un byoo-ROH deh SHANZH dan lay-ro-POR
phrases.cultural_note: Airport exchange desks offer poor rates. Use a bank ATM (distributeur) for much better euro exchange.

responses.english: Yes, at terminal one, past security.
responses.phonetic: wee oh tair-mee-NAHL UHN ah-PRAY lah say-koo-ree-TAY
responses.local: Oui, au terminal un, après la sécurité.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to pick up a rental car
phrases.text_local: Où se trouve le service de location de voitures ?
phrases.pronunciation: oo seh TROOV leh sehr-VEES deh lo-kah-SYON deh vwah-TOOR
phrases.cultural_note: Car rental desks are in the arrivals halls of both terminals. A car is ideal for exploring the Riviera hinterland.

responses.phonetic: swee-VAY lay pah-NOH loh-kah-SYOHN duh vwah-TOOR
responses.local: Suivez les panneaux Location de voitures.
